Weapon

Range1000
Reload600ms

Media

How To Read This Weapon

Damage type50% Kinetic + 50% Energy
Per hit94
Shot total564per hit x hit count
Approx. DPS973shot total + DoT / reload
Heat per sec183
Hits per shot6
TagsDoT, Multi-hit, projectile
  • Bounces to multiple targets
  • Starts at 3x targets.
  • Reduces damage dealt for x seconds.

BranchKeyLevel 1 valueLevel 100 valueMeaning
Shield LeechAddShieldVamp0.44040% effect at level 100.
Health and Shield LeechAddDualVamp0.151515% effect at level 100.
Extra ProjectilesAddExtraProjectiles0.7575Changes projectile count and redistributes damage per projectile.
Improved Direct DamageIncreaseDirectDamage0.757575% effect at level 100.
Improved RangeIncreaseRange0.252525% effect at level 100.
Reduced Power CostReducePowerCost0.22020% effect at level 100.
Reduce Target DamageReduceTargetDamage0.33030% effect at level 100.
Improved Number of HitsIncreaseNrHits0.066Adds 7 hit(s) at level 100.

Tech Levels

LevelDescriptionProjectilePrimary MaterialSecondary Material
1Increase damage by 10%. Increase number of times the spheres can bounce by one. Concussion SphereSteel x400n/a
2Increase range by 35%.Concussion SphereSteel x800n/a
3Increase damage by 40%. Increase number of times the spheres can bounce by two. Increase damage reduction by 10%. Increase duration by 2 seconds. Concussion SphereSteel x1600n/a
4Increase damage by 44%. Increase range by 35%.Concussion SphereSteel x3200Hydrogen Crystal x800
5Increase projectile speed by 20%. Increase damage by 24%. Reduce power cost by 10%. Concussion SphereSteel x6400Plasma Fluids x200
6Increase damage by 67%. Reduce power cost by 10%. Increase number of times the spheres can bounce by two. Increase damage reduction by 10%. Increase duration by 2 seconds. Concussion SphereSteel x12800Iridium x800
